'''The Red Reef''' is an [[Upcoming updates|upcoming]] quest, scheduled for release in Summer [[2026]]. It will be the second quest in the [[Quests/Series#Tortugan|Tortugan quest series]], following up on the events of [[Troubled Tortugans]]. It involves helping [[Floopa]] overcome her injury while investigating the dealings of the [[Red Reef Trading Company]], a potential new threat to the [[Tortugan]] way of life. Completion of the quest will unlock access to the [[Sacred Grove]]. Partial completion of the quest is required to access the [[Red Rock]].

Part of the quest will involve travelling underwater in a diving bell <!--2848 8925 coords--> and repairing some broken [[coral dredger]]s that the company uses to collect coral from the seafloor.

==Trivia==
* From [[14 January]] to [[21 January]] [[2026]], the quest was listed in the modern skill guide interface for Sailing under the "Quest XP" tab, with the text in grey ({{colour|#9f9f9f|The Red Reef}}). When the quest was clicked on, the usual interface opened but with the description:
{{Cquote2|{{colour|#000080|This quest is coming soon...}}

{{colour|#000080|When it releases, I can start it by talking to}} {{colour|#800000|Raley}} {{colour|#000080|at his home on the}} {{colour|#800000|Great Conch}}{{colour|#000080|.}}}}
